CometCloud Intelligence Platform

Navigation
Infrastructure
for the On-Chain World

AI-powered intelligence combining on-chain analytics, institutional fund intelligence, and RWA market data — built for institutional investors and AI agents.

◆
CIS Scoring
Open-source 5-pillar asset evaluation framework spanning Fundamentals, Market Structure, On-Chain Health, Sentiment and Alpha Independence.
Intelligence Score
◈
Fund Intelligence
GP selection framework and 100-point evaluation system for institutional crypto fund-of-funds. Track record, strategy and risk in one view.
Vault · Quant GP
◇
RWA Analytics
Real-time tokenized asset market data and signals. 40+ protocols tracked across private credit, treasury bills and real estate.
Protocol · RWA
